problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
